---
title: scipy
output: 
    github_document:
        toc: true
        toc_depth: 4
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::read_chunk("_knitr.R")
```

******************************************************************************************

https://scipy.org/

```{python, eval=TRUE}
import scipy
scipy.__version__
```

******************************************************************************************
